Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Entire Action Pursuant To An Individual Settlement And Crc 3.770
Off Calendar Dec-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KAREN BRUNO , AN INDIVIDUAL, ON BEHALF OF HERSELF AND ON BEHALF OF ALL PERSONS SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion To Dismiss Entire Action Pursuant To An Individual Settlement And CRC 3.770.

Plaintiff Karen Bruno's Motion To Dismiss Entire Action Pursuant To An Individual Settlement And CRC 3.770 to which no opposition was received is GRANTED as requested.

Prevailing party to prepare a hard copy of the proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and drop it in Dept. 301's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
